documentation.text:
@dev Deposit tokens as collateral
 @param amount Amount of tokens to deposit

@dev Withdraw collateral (only if health factor > 1)
 @param amount Amount of tokens to withdraw

@dev Borrow tokens (max 75% of collateral)
 @param amount Amount of tokens to borrow

@dev Repay borrowed tokens (partial or full)
 @param amount Amount of tokens to repay

@dev Accrue interest on borrowed amount
 @param user User address
@dev Check if a user is liquidatable (health factor < 1)

typeDescriptions.typeString: literal_string "Repay amount must be greater than 0"

arguments.value: Repay amount must be greater than 0

argumentTypes.typeString: literal_string "Repay amount must be greater than 0"

documentation.text: @dev Calculate maximum borrow amount for a user
